title: February 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 9''' is the 40th day of the year. There are 325 days remaining, 326 in leap years.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Mary Jo Duffy]] is born.
*1954 – [[Maya Kaathryn Bohnhoff]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Timothy Truman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Dan Bloom]] is born.
*1969 – [[Dylan Haggerty]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[The Bounty Hunter of Ord Mantell]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 86|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 86]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[Republic 73|''Republic'' 73]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Phil Brown]] dies.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Volume 1: Blood of the Empire]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] released in 3D in Australia and the United Kingdom.
*2012 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.30|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' Comic 6.30]] published.
*[[2013]] – "[[Sabotage (episode)|Sabotage]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – "[[Call to Action]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2016]] – [[Alethea McGrath]] dies.
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars: The Force Awakens (Disney Die-Cut Classics)|''Star Wars: The Force Awakens Disney Die-Cut Classics'' adaptation]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars: The Last Jedi (Disney Die-Cut Classics)|''Star Wars: The Last Jedi Disney Die-Cut Classics'' adaptation]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker (Disney Die-Cut Classics)|''Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker Disney Die-Cut Classics'' adaptation]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 200|''Star Wars Insider'' 200]] published.
*2021 – [[Coruscant (reference book)|''Coruscant'']] published in Spanish.
*[[2022]] – [[The High Republic: Trail of Shadows 5|''The High Republic: Trail of Shadows'' 5]] published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 14|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 14]] published.
*2022 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 20|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 20]] published.
*2022 – "[[Chapter 7: In the Name of Honor]]" premiered on [[Disney+]].
